title: Kwa soccer stars selected to represent South Africa in tourney
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS -  Two young soccers players from KwaNonqaba, Mossel Bay, were selected to represent South Africa in the annual Council of Southern Africa Football Association (Cosafa) soccer tournament.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - Two young soccers players from KwaNonqaba, Mossel Bay, were selected to represent South Africa in the annual Council of Southern Africa Football Association (Cosafa) soccer tournament."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Indiphile ‘Steve’ Mose (14) and Owam ‘Iniesta’ Nqayi (14) represented Mossel Bay and the Eden Region at the African Nations Schools U15 Championships in the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both girls are in Grade Eight at Indwe Secondary and Hillcrest Secondary in Mossel Bay and play in local soccer clubs, the Milan Ladies FC and the Black Aces Ladies.","html":"Both girls are in Grade Eight at Indwe Secondary and Hillcrest Secondary in Mossel Bay and play in local soccer clubs, the Milan Ladies FC and the Black Aces Ladies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tournament kicked off at the Idas Valley Sportsfield in Stellenbosch on Friday 5 December.","html":"The tournament kicked off at the Idas Valley Sportsfield in Stellenbosch on Friday 5 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The finals took place on Sunday 7 December.","html":"The finals took place on Sunday 7 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Indiphile ‘Steve’ Mose (14).","html":"Indiphile ‘Steve’ Mose (14). "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Other African countries competing in the Cosafa tournament included Angola, eSwatini, Lesotho, Mozambique, Namibia, Zambia, Comoros, Botswana, Zimbabwe and Malawi.","html":"Other African countries competing in the Cosafa tournament included Angola, eSwatini, Lesotho, Mozambique, Namibia, Zambia, Comoros, Botswana, Zimbabwe and Malawi."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Molfa Women’s football co-ordinator, Ntombizanele Toti, said Mossel Bay is beaming with pride after these talented girls were selected to represent South Africa and wished them all the best in their football dreams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These young girls had also competed in the Winter Schools Tournament played in Durban earlier this year.","html":"These young girls had also competed in the Winter Schools Tournament played in Durban earlier this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
